kudos.name: Sara Rodríguez
kudos.message: Sara shipped the entire onboarding revamp solo and kept every stakeholder aligned. A true force of nature.

kudos.name: James Kwon
kudos.message: Mentored two new engineers while delivering his own sprint without missing a beat. He defines team spirit.

kudos.name: Mia Bertrand
kudos.message: Mia rescued a key account through sheer proactivity. Her NPS scores sit permanently at the top.

kudos.name: Liam Torres
kudos.message: Rebuilt the entire design system in two weeks. Every designer now works faster because of him.

kudos.name: Priya Patel
kudos.message: Built our analytics dashboard from scratch. Every team makes sharper, faster decisions because of her.

kudos.name: David Osei
kudos.message: Organised three team events this quarter off his own initiative. The heartbeat of our culture.
